'''tachacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabirding|seabirding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabirding|seabirding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tachacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæchæchæth|tæchæchæth]] || [[word:tæchæchæj|tæchæchæj]] || [[word:tæchæchæsh|tæchæchæsh]] || [[word:tæchæchæ|tæchæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachachachath|tachachachath]] || [[word:tachachachaj|tachachachaj]] || [[word:tachachachash|tachachachash]] || [[word:tachachacha|tachachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachachath|tachachath]] || [[word:tachachaj|tachachaj]] || [[word:tachachash|tachachash]] || [[word:tachacha|tachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachafchath|tachafchath]] || [[word:tachafchaj|tachafchaj]] || [[word:tachafchash|tachafchash]] || [[word:tachafchaf|tachafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachachatha|tachachatha]] || [[word:tachachaja|tachachaja]] || [[word:tachachasha|tachachasha]] || [[word:tachachaka|tachachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachachath|tachachath]] || [[word:tachachaj|tachachaj]] || [[word:tachachash|tachachash]] || [[word:tachacha|tachacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachachathal|tachachathal]] || [[word:tachachajal|tachachajal]] || [[word:tachachashal|tachachashal]] || [[word:tachachakal|tachachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachachathatha|tachachathatha]] || [[word:tachachajaja|tachachajaja]] || [[word:tachachashasha|tachachashasha]] || [[word:tachachaka|tachachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachachathan|tachachathan]] || [[word:tachachajan|tachachajan]] || [[word:tachachashan|tachachashan]] || [[word:tachachakan|tachachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachachathaoro|tachachathaoro]] || [[word:tachachajaoro|tachachajaoro]] || [[word:tachachashaoro|tachachashaoro]] || [[word:tachachakaoro|tachachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
